name: Cheezy Ranch Bread- Regular Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure all ingredients as listed.
2. Combine water, sugar, salt, buttermilk powder, yogurt, egg, ranch dressing mix, and shredded cheese in a large bowl.
3. Dissolve yeast in lukewarm water separately.
4. Add the dissolved yeast to the dry ingredients and mix until a soft dough forms.
5. Follow the bread machine manufacturer's instructions for adding ingredients and baking settings.
6. Baking will produce a 1.5-pound loaf.
